# Inline formatting

**Bold with asterisks** and __bold with underscores__.
*Italic with asterisks* and _italic with underscores_.
***Bold and italic together.***
`inline code` and ~~strikethrough~~.

A [plain link](https://nettrash.me) and a
[titled link](https://nettrash.me "Hover title").
An autolink <https://nettrash.me> and an email <nettrash@nettrash.me>.

Escapes stay literal: \*not italic\*, \`not code\`, \# not a heading.
A snake_case_word keeps its underscores un-italicised.

Mixed nesting: **bold with `code` and _italic_ inside**.
